name: ClickHouse Smart Incremental Backup (With MS Teams Alerts)

parameters.body: =BACKUP ALL EXCEPT DATABASE information_schema, INFORMATION_SCHEMA, system TO S3('http://minio:9000/clickhouse-backups/backup-{{ $now.toFormat('yyyyMMdd') }}/', 'system_admin', 'qwer1234') ASYNC;

=BACKUP ALL EXCEPT DATABASE information_schema, INFORMATION_SCHEMA, system TO S3('http://minio:9000/clickhouse-backups/backup-{{ $now.toFormat('yyyyMMdd') }}/', 'system_admin', 'qwer1234') SETTINGS base_backup = S3('http://minio:9000/clickhouse-backups/backup-{{ $now.minus({days: 1}).toFormat('yyyyMMdd') }}/', 'system_admin', 'qwer1234') ASYNC;
